chain.thought: Explanation: Count the seasons with a numeric ranking in each event. Slalom: 0; Giant slalom: 6 (2005, 2006, 2007, 2009, 2012, 2013); Super G: 8 (2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2013); Downhill: 7 (2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2013); Combined: 1 (2009). Super G has the most seasons ranked.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question asks which event had a ranking in the most seasons. Count seasons with a valid rank (ignore “–” and “injured, did not compete”):
- Slalom: 0
- Giant slalom: 6 (2005, 2006, 2007, 2009, 2012, 2013)
- Super G: 8 (2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2013)
- Downhill: 7 (2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2013)
- Combined: 1 (2009)

Super G appears the most often with 8 seasons.
